source_policy: fully authored low-poly hard-surface geometry; no Meshy chassis or turret imports
uv_policy: split face texture plates, one 0-1 rectangular UV material per paintable surface group

dalle_paintability.prompt_rule: Use the filename/surface id in the prompt; do not ask DALL-E to paint labels or readable typography inside the image.
dalle_paintability.first_pass: albedo plates only; derive roughness/normal after cloud/Sense accepts silhouette and paint language.

runtime_contract.cannon_elevation: rotate cannon_elevation_pivot around local Z/X adapter in runtime as needed
runtime_contract.tread_motion: scroll material maps on left_track_motion and right_track_motion
runtime_contract.wheel_motion: rotate children of left_roadwheel_group and right_roadwheel_group
runtime_contract.commander_hatch: commander_hatch__turret_top is a named posture marker, not final hatch rig
